name: Winter Battle
description: The perfect winter season has arrived. Join the battle between Santa Claus and the Grinch under the snow. Collect all the gift boxes falling from the sky, but remember, some gift boxes are very dangerous. As you collect gift boxes, your size increases; naturally, if you collect the wrong box, your size will shrink. Collect the highest score before time runs out to win the game.
instructions: You can move with WASD and Arrow Keys Players can push each other using the Down Arrow key or the S key The player with the highest score at the end of the duration wins
